overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player moves from a busy commercial pedestrian street past food vendors, crosses a multi-lane road with traffic, and navigates through a narrow alley into an industrial district with overhead gantries.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial pedestrian street with food vendors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the commercial street toward a purple-lit food stall with hanging paper lanterns

notable_agents.action: couple standing and interacting near the food stall counter

entered.detail: tall futuristic building covered in neon advertisements and holographic displays
tall futuristic building with multiple illuminated billboards and glass facades
horizontal red neon sign with Asian characters hanging over the street
small outdoor food vendor structure with bright purple neon underlighting and white paper lanterns
traditional Japanese-style white paper lanterns with red symbols hanging in a row

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide cyberpunk commercial street at night, flanked by towering buildings covered in neon advertisements. The camera approaches a food stall illuminated by vibrant purple neon lights and traditional paper lanterns. Sparse pedestrians populate the sidewalks, including a couple interacting near the stall.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk adjacent to multi-lane road with overpass

events.description: turns right away from the food stall area toward the main street
ascends concrete stairs leading to an elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: turns right from the commercial plaza and walks along the sidewalk parallel to traffic before climbing a flight of stairs

entered.detail: blue neon corporate signage reading DATA INC on a dark building facade
bright orange metal safety railing running along the sidewalk edge
large concrete highway overpass creating partial cover overhead
wide concrete staircase with metal edges leading upward to cross the street

segments.scene_description: The player turns right from the food stall area onto a sidewalk running parallel to a multi-lane road. The DATA INC building is visible across the street, and orange guardrails line the pedestrian path. The segment ends as the player ascends a concrete staircase to cross over the traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban intersection with vehicle traffic

events.description: crosses the multi-lane road while vehicles pass through the intersection
reaches the opposite sidewalk near commercial storefronts with bright signage

agents.ego_description: descends the stairs and crosses the asphalt road, navigating between moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: blue compact van driving through the intersection
red sports car waiting at the traffic signal

entered.detail: wet black asphalt multi-lane road with white crosswalk markings
large cyan neon sign reading BELOW DECK mounted on a building facade
red neon signage for kabayan FOODS with warm orange underlighting
short yellow traffic bollards lining the curb edge

segments.scene_description: The player descends the stairs and crosses a wet asphalt intersection with active vehicle traffic. A blue van and red sports car pass by as the camera moves toward the opposite sidewalk, where the cyan BELOW DECK and red kabayan FOODS neon signs illuminate the building facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with dumpsters and graffiti

events.description: enters narrow alleyway between buildings passing dumpsters and graffiti
lighting shifts to warm orange glow from a burning barrel ahead in the alley

agents.ego_description: walks into the narrow alleyway, passing metal dumpsters and graffiti-covered walls toward a distant fire

notable_agents.action: figure sitting on the ground near the burning barrel at the alley's end

entered.detail: large green industrial dumpsters with open lids and trash bags visible
concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint tags and street art
metal barrel with open fire providing warm orange illumination
metal fire escape attached to the building facade ahead

segments.scene_description: The player turns into a narrow service alleyway flanked by high walls. Metal dumpsters and graffiti-covered concrete fill the left side while the path ahead is dimly lit by a burning barrel. A solitary figure sits near the fire as the player progresses deeper into the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with overhead gantry structures and billboards

events.description: exits the alley onto an industrial street with massive overhead metal gantries

agents.ego_description: emerges from the alley and continues down the industrial street beneath large overhead metal structures

entered.detail: massive steel truss bridge structure spanning across the street overhead with green lights
elevated metal walkway connecting buildings with bright linear lighting underneath
heavy industrial steel beams and girders forming a cage-like structure overhead
tall dark apartment building with small illuminated windows and external wiring

segments.scene_description: Exiting the alley, the scene opens onto a dark industrial street dominated by massive steel gantry bridges and overhead walkways. The architecture shifts to heavy industrial with exposed steel beams and support structures creating a canyon-like effect. The street continues forward beneath the looming metal framework.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, neon-lit commercial district into a dark, oppressive industrial zone. It begins on a wide street flanked by towering advertisements, gliding past a food stall illuminated by purple neon and traditional paper lanterns. As the camera turns right, the scene shifts toward a multi-lane road lined with orange guardrails, ascending a concrete staircase to cross over active traffic before descending onto wet asphalt where blue and red neon signs reflect off the ground. The path then narrows sharply as the camera enters a dim service alleyway filled with graffiti and metal dumpsters, passing a solitary figure beside a burning barrel. Finally, the enclosed space opens into a heavy industrial street dominated by massive steel gantry bridges and overhead walkways that create a canyon-like effect of exposed beams.
